[Please describe your concern here]

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: Last updated: March 2026
terms.intro: Welcome to GymPro. By using our platform, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions.

use.title: 1. Use of the Platform
use.content: Our platform provides tools for gym management, coaching, and fitness tracking. You agree to use the platform only for lawful purposes.

accounts.title: 2. User Accounts
accounts.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.

billing.title: 3. Fees & Payments
billing.content: Gym owners agree to pay the fees associated with their chosen subscription plan. All payments are processed securely via our payment partners.

privacy.title: 4. Privacy
privacy.content: Your use of the platform is also governed by our Privacy Policy. Please review it to understand how we handle your data.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: GymPro shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from your use of the platform.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Last updated: March 2026
privacy.intro: At GymPro, we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring your personal information is handled securely.

collect.title: 1. Information We Collect
collect.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as your name, email, and billing details, as well as usage data when you access our platform.

usage.title: 2. How We Use Information
usage.content: We use your information to provide, maintain, and improve our services, process payments, and communicate with you about your account.

sharing.title: 3. Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with service providers who help us operate the platform (e.g., payment processors).

security.title: 4. Data Security
security.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure.

rights.title: 5. Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information at any time through your account settings.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: Last updated: March 2026
cookies.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how GymPro uses cookies and similar technologies to recognize you when you visit our website.

what.title: 1. What are Cookies?
what.content: Cookies are small data files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. They are widely used by website owners in order to make their websites work, or to work more efficiently, as well as to provide reporting information.

why.title: 2. Why we use Cookies?
why.content: We use first-party and third-party cookies for several reasons. Some cookies are required for technical reasons in order for our website to operate, and we refer to these as 'essential' or 'strictly necessary' cookies.

types.title: 3. Types of Cookies we use
types.content: We use performance and functionality cookies to enhance the performance and functionality of our website but are non-essential to their use. However, without these cookies, certain functionality (like videos) may become unavailable.

control.title: 4. How can I control Cookies?
control.content: You have the right to decide whether to accept or reject cookies. You can set or amend your web browser controls to accept or refuse cookies. If you choose to reject cookies, you may still use our website though your access to some functionality and areas of our website may be restricted.

welcome.title: Welcome, Member!
welcome.subtitle: Your Fitness Journey Starts Here
welcome.desc: We're excited to have you on board! Let's take a quick tour of your gym management features.

step1.title: Workout Programs
step1.subtitle: Structured for Success
step1.desc: Discover and enroll in professionally designed workout programs tailored to your goals. Whether you want to gain muscle or lose weight, we have a plan for you.

step2.title: Training Hub
step2.subtitle: Your Daily Session
step2.desc: Access your daily routines, log your sets, reps, and weights. Stay focused with our integrated rest timer and exercise guides.

step3.title: Track Progress
step3.subtitle: Visualize Your Growth
step3.desc: Monitor your transformation with detailed charts. Track body measurements, weight changes, and performance improvements over time.

step4.title: Expert Coaching
step4.subtitle: Personalized Guidance
step4.desc: Connect with certified coaches for personalized plans and direct feedback. Elevate your fitness journey with professional support.

step5.title: Gym Schedule
step5.subtitle: Never Miss a Beat
step5.desc: Book your favorite classes and view gym hours. Stay organized with a personalized calendar that keeps your training on track.

step6.title: Become a Coach
step6.subtitle: Share Your Passion
step6.desc: Expert in fitness? Apply to become a coach on GymPro. Manage your own clients, create programs, and grow your professional brand.

step7.title: Profile Settings
step7.subtitle: Make it Yours
step7.desc: Customize your experience. Manage your personal information, notification preferences, and account security in one place.

delete_account.section_description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
delete_account.confirmation_mismatch: Please type 'DELETE MY ACCOUNT' to confirm
delete_account.otp_send_failed: Failed to send OTP to email
delete_account.otp_rate_limited: Please wait 1 minute before requesting another verification code.

delete_account.otp_rate_limited_minutes_plural: Please wait {{count}} minutes before requesting another verification code.
delete_account.otp_sent: OTP code sent to your email

delete_account.title: Delete Account
delete_account.warning_message: Deleting your account is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data, memberships, and progress will be deleted.
